channel.title: NAM Saiz-Rodríguez, T Peña, L Lázaro, Á González, A Martínez, JA Cordero, JT Vicente, F Richard, MJ Coma, M de Frutos, J Labrador, A Pueyo | PlatCOVID

item.title: Outpatient treatment of COVID-19 with steroids in the phase of mild pneumonia without the need for admission as an opportunity to modify the course of the disease: A structured summary of a randomised controlled trial.
